project: PRJ02722 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9886 - I-Drift_ Leak_Detection_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: No movement of people or equipment planned. Logging is not expected in the next 2 days.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment:
Provisional crew lookahead for Dan
DFA18 expected until 12/6
12-19th June - DFE06 - no need for READ
19th June to 7th July - DFA16 - READ upman required

The above information means Abdil's crew change may not be needed and downman instead

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
We will be running MFC on HBB-01 during the weekend and then backload equipment – last job on the Halfdan campaign.
Leonard Lapiso provisionally planned to CC Abdil on Dan end of next week

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: First 3" flexidrift run made it to 9000ft. Was sticky RIH and high tension pickup weights. Decision made to change over to Braided line. Prior to changing over, a 3.62" flexidrift was run, that made it to 10182ft. Today: pressure testing the PCE for braided setup, followed by MFC. Slb also waiting on a cutter sub to arrive this morning. Latest lookahed has 11am today rig up.
